title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners
company: Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners in Hyderabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners:
Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners!
